mapper.select: SELECT ga.id AS groupId, ga.type, ga.title, ga.cover, ga.group_min_num AS groupMinNum, ga.group_max_num AS groupMaxNum, ga.group_min_num AS pNum, ga.group_max_num AS maxNum, ga.current_num AS currentNum, ga.start_time AS startTime, ga.server_end_time AS endTime, CAST(ga.base_price AS DECIMAL(10,2)) AS groupPrice, CAST(ga.base_price AS DECIMAL(10,2)) AS originPrice, ROUND( 0.50 * IFNULL(ga.current_num, 0) / NULLIF(GREATEST(IFNULL(ga.group_max_num, 0), 1), 0) + 0.30 * IFNULL(ga.sort_order, 0) / NULLIF((SELECT MAX(IFNULL(x.sort_order, 0)) FROM osh_group_activity x WHERE x.status IN (1, 2) AND x.delete_flag = 0), 0) + 0.20 * CASE WHEN TIMESTAMPDIFF(DAY, ga.start_time, NOW()) <= 30 THEN 1.20 WHEN TIMESTAMPDIFF(DAY, ga.start_time, NOW()) <= 90 THEN 1.00 WHEN TIMESTAMPDIFF(DAY, ga.start_time, NOW()) <= 180 THEN 0.80 ELSE 0.60 END , 4) AS hotScore FROM osh_group_activity ga WHERE ga.status IN (1, 2) AND ga.delete_flag = 0 ORDER BY hotScore DESC, ga.id DESC LIMIT #{limit}
